chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-713 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 07-09-2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
